02173|   const loadApprovals = async () => {
02174|     if (!address || !revokeChain) return
02175|     
02176|     setIsLoadingApprovals(true)
02177|     try {
02178|       console.log('Loading approvals for chain:', revokeChain.displayName, 'address:', address)
02179|       
02180|       const { createPublicClient, http, defineChain, parseAbiItem } = await import('viem')
02181|       
02182|       const chainConfig = defineChain({
02183|         id: revokeChain.id,
02184|         name: revokeChain.displayName,
02185|         nativeCurrency: {
02186|           name: revokeChain.currency.name,
02187|           symbol: revokeChain.currency.symbol,
02188|           decimals: revokeChain.currency.decimals,
02189|         },
02190|         rpcUrls: {
02191|           default: { http: [revokeChain.httpRpcUrl] },
02192|         },
02193|       })
02194|       
02195|       const publicClient = createPublicClient({
02196|         chain: chainConfig,
02197|         transport: http(revokeChain.httpRpcUrl),
02198|       })
02199|       
02200|       // Get current block number
02201|       const currentBlock = await publicClient.getBlockNumber()
02202|       console.log('Current block:', currentBlock)
02203|       
02204|       // Scan for Approval events from the last 1M blocks (or less if chain is new)
02205|       const fromBlock = currentBlock > 1000000n ? currentBlock - 1000000n : 0n
02206|       
02207|       console.log('Scanning for Approval events from block', fromBlock.toString(), 'to', currentBlock.toString())
02208|       
02209|       // Get Approval events where owner is the user's address
02210|       const approvalEvents = await publicClient.getLogs({
02211|         event: parseAbiItem('event Approval(address indexed owner, address indexed spender, uint256 value)'),
02212|         args: {
02213|           owner: address as `0x${string}`,
02214|         },
02215|         fromBlock,
02216|         toBlock: currentBlock,
02217|       })
02218|       
02219|       console.log('Found', approvalEvents.length, 'Approval events')
02220|       
02221|       // Group by token address and spender
02222|       const approvalMap = new Map<string, { token: string; spender: string; lastValue: bigint; blockNumber: bigint }>()
02223|       
02224|       for (const event of approvalEvents) {
02225|         const tokenAddress = event.address
02226|         const spender = event.args.spender
02227|         const value = event.args.value
02228|         
02229|         if (!spender || value === undefined) continue
02230|         
02231|         const key = `${tokenAddress.toLowerCase()}-${spender.toLowerCase()}`
02232|         
02233|         // Keep the most recent approval value
02234|         const existing = approvalMap.get(key)
02235|         if (!existing || event.blockNumber > existing.blockNumber) {
02236|           approvalMap.set(key, {
02237|             token: tokenAddress,
02238|             spender,
02239|             lastValue: value,
02240|             blockNumber: event.blockNumber,
02241|           })
02242|         }
02243|       }
02244|       
02245|       console.log('Unique token-spender pairs:', approvalMap.size)
02246|       
02247|       const foundApprovals: typeof approvals = []
02248|       
02249|       // Now check current allowances for each unique token-spender pair
02250|       const uniquePairs = Array.from(approvalMap.values())
02251|       console.log('Checking current allowances for', uniquePairs.length, 'unique token-spender pairs')
02252|       
02253|       let checkedCount = 0
02254|       let activeCount = 0
02255|       
02256|       for (const pair of uniquePairs) {
02257|         try {
02258|           checkedCount++
02259|           
02260|           // Fetch token info
02261|           const tokenInfo = await relayAPI.getCurrencies({
02262|             address: pair.token,
02263|             chainIds: [revokeChain.id],
02264|             limit: 1,
02265|           })
02266|           
02267|           const token = tokenInfo[0]
02268|           if (!token) {
02269|             console.log('Token not found in Relay DB:', pair.token)
02270|             continue
02271|           }
02272|           
02273|           // Check current allowance (might have been revoked since the event)
02274|           const currentAllowance = await publicClient.readContract({
02275|             address: pair.token as `0x${string}`,
02276|             abi: [{
02277|               name: 'allowance',
02278|               type: 'function',
02279|               stateMutability: 'view',
02280|               inputs: [
02281|                 { name: 'owner', type: 'address' },
02282|                 { name: 'spender', type: 'address' }
02283|               ],
02284|               outputs: [{ name: 'remaining', type: 'uint256' }],
02285|             }],
02286|             functionName: 'allowance',
02287|             args: [address as `0x${string}`, pair.spender as `0x${string}`],
02288|           })
02289|           
02290|           console.log(`${token.symbol} current allowance for ${pair.spender}:`, currentAllowance.toString())
02291|           
02292|           if (currentAllowance > 0n) {
02293|             activeCount++
02294|             const maxUint256 = BigInt('0xffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff')
02295|             const isUnlimited = currentAllowance >= maxUint256 / 2n
02296|             
02297|             console.log(`✓ Active approval: ${token.symbol} → ${pair.spender}, allowance:`, currentAllowance.toString())
02298|             
02299|             foundApprovals.push({
02300|               token,
02301|               spender: pair.spender,
02302|               spenderName: undefined, // Will show address
02303|               allowance: currentAllowance.toString(),
02304|               allowanceFormatted: isUnlimited ? 'Unlimited' : formatUnits(currentAllowance, token.decimals),
02305|             })
02306|           }
02307|         } catch (e) {
02308|           console.error('Error checking approval for', pair.token, pair.spender, e)
02309|         }
02310|       }
02311|       
02312|       console.log('Approval scan complete:', {
02313|         eventsFound: approvalEvents.length,
02314|         uniquePairs: uniquePairs.length,
02315|         checked: checkedCount,
02316|         activeApprovals: activeCount
02317|       })
02318|       
02319|       console.log('Found', foundApprovals.length, 'approvals')
02320|       setApprovals(foundApprovals)
02321|     } catch (error) {
02322|       console.error('Failed to load approvals:', error)
02323|       toast.error('Failed to load approvals')
02324|     } finally {
02325|       setIsLoadingApprovals(false)
02326|     }
02327|   }
